zh.lifeSummary: 當Anders Hansson Ekeblad於1500年出生在瑞典斯卡拉波格斯特洛斯托拉時，他的父親Hans Jåpsson60歲，母親Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekeblad74歲。他於1534年與Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne在瑞典結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年7月25日在德國哈包格享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anders Hansson Ekeblad于1500年出生在瑞典斯卡拉波格斯特洛斯托拉时，他的父亲Hans Jåpsson60岁，母亲Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekeblad74岁。他于1534年与Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne在瑞典结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1543年7月25日在德国哈包格享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hansson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Anders, Erik, Niels, Elof, Gudrun, Jarl, Lennart, Mats, Niklas, Per, Sten.  Dutch Henrik.  German Hans, Elfriede, Kurt.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name   Hans  .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, or North German   Hanssen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Hans
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ananta, Bhim, Chander, Gopal, Madhur, Malkit, Nirmal, Preet, Puneet, Ravi, Rohit, Roop.  German Erwin, Guenther, Helmut, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Kurt, Manfred, Merwin.

German and Dutch: from the personal name Hans, a shortened form of Johannes (see John ). This surname is also found in France (Vosges, Alsace, Lorraine, and Nord). It is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an adoption of the German or Dutch surname.
Indian (Punjab): Arora and Sikh name, from Sanskrit hamsa ‘swan’ or ‘goose’.

nameMeanings.name: Ekeblad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements ek ‘oak’ +blad ‘leaf’.

nameMeanings.name: Anders
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: Treaty of Malmo
historicEvents.description: The Treaty of Malmo was signed on September 1, 1524, which ended the Swedish War of Liberation and the independence of Sweden was recognized by Denmark and Norway.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

en.lifeSummary: When Anders Hansson Ekeblad was born in 1500, in Stola, Strö, Skaraborg, Sweden, his father, Hans Jåpsson, was 60 and his mother, Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekeblad, was 74. He married Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne in 1534, in Sweden. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 July 1543, in Hamburg, Germany, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anders Hansson Ekeblad est né en 1500, à Stola, Strö, Skaraborg, Suède, son père, Hans Jåpsson, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekeblad, avait 74 ans. Il a épousé Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne en 1534, à Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1543, à Hamburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anders Hansson Ekeblad 1500 in Stola, Strö, Skaraborg, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hans Jåpsson 60 und seine Mutter Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekeblad 74. Er hat 1534 in Schweden Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juli 1543 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Hamburg, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anders Hansson Ekeblad è nato il nel 1500 nel Stola, Strö, Skaraborg, Svezia, il suo padre, Hans Jåpsson, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekeblad, aveva 74 anni. Lui sposato Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne nel 1534, nel Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 luglio 1543, nel Hamburg, Germania, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anders Hansson Ekebladが1500年にスウェーデンスカラボルグストルoストラで生まれた時，父Hans Jåpssonは60歳，母Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekebladは74歳であった。1534年にスウェーデンでAgneta Nilsdotter Halvmåneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年7月25日にドイツハンブルグで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anders Hansson Ekeblad(이)가 1500년 스웨덴 스카라볼그 스트o 스톨아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hans Jåpsson(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekeblad(은)는 74세였다. 그는 1534년 스웨덴에서 Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 7월 25일 독일 햄버그에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.BET 17 JUN 1529 AND 21 JUN 1529: de 17 de junho de 1529 a 21 de junho de 1529
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anders Hansson Ekeblad nasceu em 1500, em Stola, Strö, Skaraborg, Suécia, seu pai, Hans Jåpsson, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekeblad, tinha 74 anos. Ele casou-se com Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne em 1534, em Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1543, em Hamburg, Alemanha, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anders Hansson Ekeblad родился в 1500 г. в местности стола, стрo, скараборг, Швеция, его отцу по имени Hans Jåpsson было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Brita Beata Piijk Andersson Ekeblad, 74. Он женился на женщине по имени Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne в 1534 г. в местности Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 июля 1543 г. в местности хамбург, Германия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.BET 17 JUN 1529 AND 21 JUN 1529: desde 17 de junio de 1529 hasta 21 de junio de 1529

Se casó con Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne en 1534, en Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de julio de 1543, en Hamburg, Alemania, a la edad de 43 años.
